englishDefinitions: To feel attracted to someone, often in a romantic or sexual way.
To have a special liking or strong interest in someone.
persianTranslation: از کسی خوشش آمدن / به کسی کشش داشتن
examples: I think he has a thing for his coworker.
She had a thing for musicians when she was younger.
Everyone could tell he had a thing for her.
